title: Models, Interactions API, Capabilities, Stability, and Provider Ports · Language Clinic: Stable Preview Boundary
summary: The code hard-codes a preview model, assumes every endpoint supports tools and schemas, mixes legacy generateContent examples with Interactions state, and has no migration seam. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the stable preview boundary increment in verified model capability and provider-adapter record. Learners progress through pr…
objectives: Separate stable, preview, experimental, deprecated, and retired features and assign migration, fallback, and re-review owners.
Discover and record model support for interactions, function calls, structured output, multimodal parts, thinking, streaming, context, and limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory agent engineering team handles case 8092 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example agent engineering team handles case 8092 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate stable, preview, experimental, deprecated, and retired features and assign migration, fallback, and re-review owners. A defensible solution applies Stable Preview Boundary, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to verified model capability and provider-adapter record.

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-stable-preview-boundary — Separate stable, preview, experimental, deprecated, and retired features and assign migration, fallback, and re-review owners.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-model-api-capabilities-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-model-api-capabilities-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_model_api_capabilities_3(required_capabilities: int = 7, verified_capabilities: int = 7, stable_features: int = 5, preview_features: int = 2, undocumented_assumptions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-shape"
    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Stable Preview Boundary evidence · Theory Stable Preview Boundary
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-stable-preview-boundary-13dhcd" that uses case 5526 to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Build Stable Preview Boundary evidence · Theory Stable Preview Boundary.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Stable Preview Boundary into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Build Stable Preview Boundary evidence · Theory Stable Preview Boundary, keep Stable Preview Boundary connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-stable-preview-boundary-13dhcd
# Competency: agentpy-stable-preview-boundary.
# Case 5526: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_stable_preview_boundary_13dhcd(required_capabilities: int = 7, verified_capabilities: int = 7, stable_features: int = 5, preview_features: int = 2, undocumented_assumptions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_13dhcd = "13dhcd-dchd31-5526"
    assert evidence_variant_13dhcd
    evidence_axes_13dhcd = (
        "authority13dhcd",
        "interaction5526",
        "tooldchd31",
        "state13dhcd5526",
        "evaluation552613dhcd",
        "recoverydchd315526",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_13dhcd)) == 6
    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-shape"
    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"

steps.why: Correct order keeps Stable Preview Boundary assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Safe AI agents and Python Sequence Stable Preview Boundary evidence · Theory Stable Preview Boundary, keep Stable Preview Boundary connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.text: A theory agent engineering team handles case 6473 during a controlled support-operations rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate stable, preview, experimental, deprecated, and retired features and assign migration, fallback, and re-review owners.
